arts.ttl: Chelsea considering move for Strasbourg striker
arts.sum: Chelsea are considering a move to sign striker Emanuel Emegha from sister side Strasbourg. Enzo Maresca wants to bring in another centre-forward to provide competition and cover for Nicolas Jackson. Chelsea’s recruitment team have been monitoring the performances of Emegha, who has impressed this season in Ligue 1. He is one of several potential targets […] The post Chelsea considering move for Strasbourg striker first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea and Tottenham boss Jose Mourinho grabs rival manager's face in angry bust-up
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Tottenham manager Jose Mourinho is back in the headlines once again for his antics in Turkey after being involved in an alteration with Galatasaray boss Okan Buruk. Mourinho, who is known for his touchline antics, received a four-match ban, which was later halved, after making 'derogatory and offensive statements towards the Turkish referee'.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Arsenal injury point as Tottenham boss makes feelings on fixtures clear
arts.sum: Spurs travel on Thursday to London rivals Chelsea, who have been criticised for a £1billion spending spree since owners Clearlake Capital took over in 2022, but now boast an enormous dearth of talent which may help them handle the Club World Cup. Nevertheless, Chelsea’s recent form has been mixed and coincided with a plethora of injuries, which was also the case for Tottenham during a winter period where Postecoglou was regularly without 10 players or more while still in multiple competitions. “We kind of know now that there’s nine league games, hopefully five in Europa, so you’ve got 14 games – 53 days together,” Postecoglou said.

arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou senses from Tottenham squad as Romero and Van de Ven Chelsea start explained
arts.sum: What will help Tottenham in the run-in is that Postecoglou now has the vast majority of his players back to fitness ahead of a crucial block of games. A top-half finish in the Premier League table looks a big ask for Spurs heading into the final nine games of the term but they do still have the opportunity to win the Europa League.

arts.ttl: 'He's a threat': Clive Allen has been so impressed by Tottenham's £50m target who Daniel Levy really wants
arts.sum: Clive Allen has been full of praise for one of Tottenham’s top summer transfer targets ahead of his trip to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on the...

arts.sum: Leeds United are keeping an eye on Chelsea shot-stopper Djordje Petrovic in their new goalkeeper search, according to… The post Leeds United tracking Chelsea goalkeeper amid continued Meslier struggles appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho transfer twist as Enzo Maresca responds to Man Utd demands
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho moved to Chelsea on loan with a permanent move on his radar but Enzo Maresca is yet to make a call on his future with Manchester United needing his sale to fund their summer plans

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea could end up having to pay Palmeiras another £18m for Estevao Willian - journalist
Chelsea player gains 5-6kg of muscle – Wants to put injuries behind him
arts.sum: Last summer, Chelsea signed Aaron Anselmino from Boca Juniors and immediately sent him back on a season-long loan deal. The Premier League club cut short the centre-back’s loan stay and recalled him in January due to injuries to other players. He’s yet to make his debut for the Blues. arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho sends agent 'instruction' as Chelsea discover £50m release clause chance
arts.sum: Both stints have seen Sancho play his best football and the demand from the forward - reportedly - came before Maresca insisted that the player "could do better" at Chelsea. According to BILD, Chelsea loanee Jadon Sancho has insisted to his agent that he wants to move back to former club Borussia Dortmund in the summer.
